$schema_comment: Grok Build hooks. Canonical guardrail logic lives in .claude/hooks/ and brain/hooks/; bin/run-claude-hook.sh only adapts payload and verdict shapes - never fork hook logic into a Grok-only copy. WINDOWS: replace `bash` in each command with Git Bash's full path (e.g. "C:/Program Files/Git/bin/bash.exe") - a bare bash can resolve to WSL, where HOME and every path are wrong. If your harness does not run hooks from the project root, make the script path absolute too.
